title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey has performed very well during
her first three years in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's made irreplaceable friends through her
racing... and now those bonds are starting to take
on a new form.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Are you ready, Rickey? Let's do it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You got it, Falco! One... Two...

text_block_list.name: Rickey and Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We're the idol group of the Four Guardians—the
Tetra Mystics!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yep, that was perfect! ♪ Let's all do our best!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Um... Falco? Even if this is pretty normal for the
two of us...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Are Rickey and Acute going to be okay as idols?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, idols... I used to watch idols performing on
television every year, during those new year
specials.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to bring more attention to dirt
racing, then just running might not be enough.
Promotional stuff like this is kinda important too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Right, Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And I saw that my lucky number was four!
Besides, the way I see it, this will help bring us all
closer to our dreams.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I see. And how about the name, "Tetra Mystics"?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
They're the Four Guardians of feng shui, but I
thought they suited us four perfectly! First of all...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon is the Vermilion Bird!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Fwooosh! ☆ Yeah, that makes sense. My name's
Falcon, so the bird one does suit me best. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Hokko Tarumae as the Black
Tortoise!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Wait. Why am I the tortoise?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, the "Hokko" in your name has the
characters for "north" and "happiness" in it, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In the world of feng shui, the Black Tortoise is the
Guardian who watches over the north. That's why
it suits you!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... Well, I was born in Hokkaido, and I'm slowly and steadily making my way forward as a racer and an idol, so that does kind of suit me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And then Wonder Acute is going to be the White
Tiger!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh? A tiger?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep! "Acute" means "sharp," and the White Tiger
has sharp claws.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I see. My hidden claws might just pop out to
say hello! Grawr!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And finally, I'm going to be the Azure Dragon. ☆
With our mystical powers combined, we'll rise to
the top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They align pretty perfectly with the Four
Guardians. All that's left is to polish their
performance.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's work on our dancing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll go first! I'll show you the special movies
I made for Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Go, go! ♪ Love, love! ♪ Let's gooo! ♪ Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I'll go next! I am a local idol, after all!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Go, go! ♪ Love, love! ♪ Let's gooo! ♪ Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You're really good, Tarumae! But I'm gonna
nail this, too. Watch!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Go, go! ♪ Love, love! ♪ Let's gooo! ♪ Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, that just leaves me, doesn't it? Here I go,
then!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Boogie! ♪ Woogie! ♪ Boogie! ♪ Woogie! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Something's a little off...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Acute! I'll help you with your dancing
like you always help me with my running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the idol group Tetra Mystics is born...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Our battle begins here! And our goal as a
four-person unit is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Right! To spread feng shui so everyone knows about it!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Rickey, that's not our goal. Our goal is to fill
every seat in Tomakomai Citizen Hall!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, really? I thought we were getting together
to enjoy each other's company and eat rice
crackers...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? I thought we wanted to host our own
festival? I guess we all have different goals.
Rickey, let's sort this out.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, this sounds like a job for my luopan
compass! The direction we should take iiis...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The direction shown by the compass is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it says Trainer's standing in our lucky
direction! That means...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
As well as being my trainer, I think you should
manage our unit, too.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Good idea... I mean, your trainer's done a pretty
amazing job of guiding you so far.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes, very much so. Such a promising young
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's a good point. And we'll definitely need someone looking after us from offstage! Okay, it's settled!

text_block_list.name: Rickey and Falcon
text_block_list.text: We're counting on you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tarumae and Acute
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like I've been roped into another job on
top of my regular one. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is all to promote Copano Rickey and her
friends. I'm confident this will help us all to come
together and further our dirt racing cause.
